questionHtml: Calculate the initial % content of Fe2+ in the raw spinach, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
«mol» MnO4− «=0.00339 × 0.01» = 3.38 × 10−5 «mol» ✓

«mol MnO4−: mol Fe+2 = 1:5»

«mol» Fe2+ = 1.95 × 10−4 ✓

% Fe2+ «= 1.95 × 10−4 × 55.8 × 100/2.0»= 0.47«%» ✓

 

Must show working for the marks.

meta.title: Calculate the initial % content of Fe2+ in the raw spinach, showing your working.
